CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-15-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants' Notice Of And Motion For Protective Order To Limit Plaintiffs' Non Retained Experts
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO LIMIT PLAINTIFFS' NON RETAINED EXPERTS is granted as to Plaintiffs' non-retained experts to the extent their identities were not disclosed in Plaintiffs' responses to written discovery requests or in Plaintiffs' depositions, if any. The motion is otherwise denied. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge VJ Harry Jacobs, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS RENATA FISHER, MICHAEL KRAMES' MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

JPT Recusal. Matter is continued to August 18, 2022.

Per the instructions posted on the department's website (https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/civil/law-motion), parties must attach electronic copies of discovery motion papers to an email addressed to Discovery302@sftc.org. Defendants' Notice Of And Motion For Protective Order To Limit Plaintiffs' Non Retained Experts

MINI MINUTES:

Jason Wolford, Esq. (415.649.6203; jason@wolford-wayne.com) of Wolford Wayne LLP for Plaintiffs.
Tara Murray, Esq, (415.981.5411; tmurray@bledsoelaw.com) of Bledsoe Diestel Treppa & Crane LLP for Defendants.
